137 D0350_NGTV_STATE_NTFY_STF_CD D0350_NGTV_STATE_NTFY_STF_CD D0350 Resident Mood Interview - Negative Statements Notify Staff Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the staff or provider informed that there is potential for resident self harm. -=Not assessed/no information

1=Yes
^=Blank(skip pattern) discontinued 9/30/2019
